description: You are a Port Authority Hydrographer planning a bathymetric survey. Create a Bridge Command scenario that simulates a survey vessel executing a 'lawnmower' parallel track search pattern based on the mission specifications found in '/home/ga/Documents/Survey_Mission_Specs.txt'. The scenario must be created at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/Hydrographic_Survey/' and include 'environment.ini' and 'othership.ini' files. The survey vessel must start at the Datum point and execute a pattern of 6 parallel lines following the vector logic (Run Line -> Turn 90 deg -> Cross-leg spacing -> Turn 90 deg -> Reciprocal Line) derived from the specs. Use the 'Lat(N,M)' and 'Long(N,M)' coordinate format for waypoints within the configuration files.
